headline: Hilton’s Direct Navan Tie-Up and India Expansion Might Change The Case For Investing In Hilton Worldwide Holdings (HLT)
summary: In recent weeks, Navan Inc. announced plans to launch an industry-first direct hotel–Travel Management Company connection co-created with Hilton Worldwide Holdings, while Hilton also continued expanding its Indian footprint with a new 211-room Hilton Garden Inn in Bengaluru and refreshed its global brand campaign. Together, these moves highlight how Hilton is pairing technology-led corporate distribution, on-campus hotel growth in key business hubs, and high-profile marketing to reinforce...

headline: The Debates That Matter For CCL Stock
summary: Carnival's stock has lagged despite a story of record results, and the tension comes down to one critical question about the real strength of its pricing power.
